summary: Iteration 16: Successfully tested PDF Viewer feature - all 34 frontend tests and 22 backend tests passed. New PDF viewer component with react-pdf library working correctly.

test_results.frontend: 100% (34/34 Playwright tests passed across 4 spec files)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test PDF document (doc_71438fad9dc7) for PDF viewer testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All PDF viewer features verified working: 1) PDF viewer tabs (PDF-Ansicht and Extrahierter Text) display correctly in document preview dialog, 2) PDF-Ansicht tab is selected by default, 3) Tab switching works correctly, 4) PDF viewer toolbar with controls (page navigation, zoom in/out, rotate, download) all visible and functional, 5) Zoom controls work correctly (100% -> 125% on zoom in, 100% -> 75% on zoom out), 6) PDF content loads and renders using react-pdf library, 7) Page count displays after PDF loads, 8) Extracted text tab shows document text content, 9) Backend /api/documents/{id}/file endpoint returns valid PDF files with correct content-type and content-disposition headers.

pdf_viewer_tabs.notes: Document preview dialog shows two tabs: PDF-Ansicht (PDF viewer) and Extrahierter Text (extracted text). Default tab is PDF-Ansicht.

pdf_viewer_controls.notes: PDF viewer toolbar includes: page navigation (prev/next buttons, page input), zoom controls (zoom in/out with percentage display), rotate button, and download button.

pdf_viewer_zoom.notes: Zoom in increases from 100% to 125%, zoom out decreases from 100% to 75%. Percentage display updates correctly.

pdf_content_loading.notes: react-pdf library loads and renders PDF content. Document and Page components render correctly. Page count displays after load.

tab_switching.notes: Can switch between PDF-Ansicht and Extrahierter Text tabs. Tab states update correctly (active/inactive).

extracted_text_tab.notes: Extracted text tab shows document text in a pre-formatted block.

pdf_file_endpoint.notes: GET /api/documents/{id}/file returns PDF file with application/pdf content-type. File starts with %PDF- header. Authentication required.

convert_to_article.notes: Existing 'In Artikel umwandeln' button still works - navigates to article editor with PDF content pre-filled.

api_tests_performed.pdf_file_success: GET /api/documents/{id}/file - Returns valid PDF file with correct headers
api_tests_performed.pdf_file_valid_pdf: Verifies file content starts with %PDF- header
api_tests_performed.pdf_file_content_disposition: Response includes filename in content-disposition header

ui_tests_performed.pdf_viewer_tabs_visible: Both PDF-Ansicht and Extrahierter Text tabs visible in dialog
ui_tests_performed.pdf_viewer_tab_default: PDF-Ansicht tab is active by default
ui_tests_performed.tab_switch_functionality: Tab switching updates active state correctly
ui_tests_performed.toolbar_controls_visible: All toolbar controls (prev, next, page input, zoom out, zoom in, rotate, download) are visible
ui_tests_performed.zoom_in_works: Clicking zoom in increases percentage from 100% to 125%
ui_tests_performed.zoom_out_works: Clicking zoom out decreases percentage from 100% to 75%
ui_tests_performed.pdf_content_renders: react-pdf Document and Page components render
ui_tests_performed.page_count_displays: Page count (/ X format) appears after PDF loads
ui_tests_performed.extracted_text_shows: Extracted text tab shows document content
